meta.title: Reference · Aethyr docs
meta.description: Every tool in the Aethyr build, grouped by category, plus the skills, the audit agent, configuration flags, and backends.

sections.heading: Tools by category
sections.html:
Every tool this build ships, grouped by category, plus the skills, the audit agent, the environment flags, and how the backends route. This is the whole surface; what you see is what you get.

One package, the proven core. These 82 tools are the ones verified safe against real projects. Read tools can't mutate; every write saves through a compile gate and a backup. Tools that could corrupt a project (or that aren't fully proven) simply aren't in this build.

tools.name: add_component
tools.description: Add a component (StaticMeshComponent, AudioComponent, etc.) to a Blueprint's SimpleConstructionScript tree: author-time component setup, not runtime spawning.

tools.name: add_function
tools.description: Create a new BP function graph with the given name.

tools.name: add_function_input
tools.description: Add an input parameter to an existing function.

tools.name: add_function_output
tools.description: Add an output parameter to an existing function.

tools.name: add_node
tools.description: Spawn a new K2 (Blueprint) node in a graph.

tools.name: add_variable
tools.description: Add a member variable to a Blueprint class.

tools.name: apply_ops
tools.description: Execute a batch of write operations sequentially in a single tool call.

tools.name: attach_component
tools.description: Re-parent an SCS component on a Blueprint.

tools.name: auto_layout_graph
tools.description: Auto-position the nodes in a Blueprint graph so they don't overlap.

tools.name: bp_structural_diff
tools.description: Compare two Blueprints structurally: variables, components, function/macro/event-graph node signatures, connection counts.

tools.name: clone_graph
tools.description: Copy every node in `graph` from the `source` Blueprint into the same-named graph of the `target` Blueprint, preserving wiring.

tools.name: create_blueprint
tools.description: Create a new Blueprint asset under `/Game/...` extending `parent_class`.

tools.name: delete_function
tools.description: Delete a Blueprint function graph by name.

tools.name: delete_node
tools.description: Delete a K2 node by GUID.

tools.name: delete_variable
tools.description: Remove a Blueprint member variable by name.

tools.name: find_dangling_references
tools.description: Walk a Blueprint's function bodies (and optionally top-level graphs) for nodes referencing variables / intra-BP functions that no longer exist on the BP.

tools.name: find_node
tools.description: Search all nodes in a Blueprint by class name or title substring (case-insensitive); searches ALL graphs at once, unlike `get_graph` which reads one named graph.

tools.name: find_overriders
tools.description: Find Blueprints under `path` that match a structural query: extend `parent_class`, override `function_name`, and/or implement `interface`.

tools.name: get_components
tools.description: List the SCS components (StaticMeshComponent, LightComponent, child actors, etc.) attached to a blueprint, with parent/child hierarchy.

tools.name: get_function
tools.description: Fetch a specific Blueprint function by name: signature (inputs, outputs, locals) + body graph.

tools.name: get_graph
tools.description: Fetch a Blueprint graph by name (default: EventGraph).

tools.name: get_node
tools.description: Fetch a single K2 node by GUID inside a graph.

tools.name: implement_interface
tools.description: Add `interface` to the implemented-interfaces list of the `asset` Blueprint, generating the stub function graphs the interface requires.

tools.name: list_blueprints
tools.description: List Blueprint assets under a content path.

tools.name: list_timelines
tools.description: List all Timeline nodes in a Blueprint (names, track counts, length, loop, auto_play).

tools.name: list_variables
tools.description: List all member variables on a Blueprint, with type, default, category, and replication state.

tools.name: peek_graph
tools.description: Lightweight probe for a Blueprint graph: returns node count + kind histogram + connection count without any node/pin/connection detail.

tools.name: read_blueprint
tools.description: Read top-level metadata for a Blueprint: parent class, interfaces, variables, function/graph summaries, macros.

tools.name: read_timeline
tools.description: Read a Timeline from a Blueprint: float/vector/event/linear_color tracks with their FRichCurveKey arrays (time, value, interp).

tools.name: remove_component
tools.description: Remove a component from a Blueprint's SCS tree by name.

tools.name: rename_variable
tools.description: Rename a Blueprint member variable.

tools.name: retype_variable
tools.description: Change a Blueprint member variable's type without delete + re-add.

tools.name: set_component_property
tools.description: Set a UPROPERTY on a Blueprint component's template (the author-time default values, what the BP Details panel shows for that component).

tools.name: set_node_position
tools.description: Move a K2 node (by GUID) to (x, y) inside a Blueprint graph.

tools.name: set_pin_default
tools.description: Set the literal default value on a node's input pin.

tools.name: set_variable_category
tools.description: Change the My-Blueprint-panel category label on a Blueprint member variable (the "Stats" / "Combat" group header in the BP editor).

tools.name: set_variable_default
tools.description: Change a Blueprint member variable's default value (string form, as displayed in the Details panel: e.g.

tools.name: summarize_blueprint
tools.description: Tiny orientation response for a Blueprint: parent class plus counts of variables, functions, graphs, macros, and interfaces.

tools.name: wire_pins
tools.description: Connect two K2 pins.

tools.name: get_compile_status
tools.description: Blueprint compile status: wraps `UBlueprint::Status` into a stable string.

tools.name: get_dirty_packages
tools.description: List loaded packages with unsaved changes.

tools.name: get_material_instance_params
tools.description: Dump scalar/vector/texture parameter values from a UMaterialInstanceConstant asset.

tools.name: get_static_mesh_info
tools.description: Static mesh LOD / triangle / vertex info.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Probe whether the live editor is responsive.

tools.name: list_anim_blueprints
tools.description: List UAnimBlueprint assets under a content path.

tools.name: list_anim_montages
tools.description: List UAnimMontage assets under a content path (default `/Game`).

tools.name: read_anim_blueprint
tools.description: Walk a UAnimBlueprint: parent class + each state machine's states (state / conduit / transition / entry).

tools.name: read_anim_montage
tools.description: Read a UAnimMontage: sections (name, start_time, next_section), notifies (name, trigger_time, duration, notify_class), slot tracks (slot_name, anim segments with anim_sequence path).

tools.name: get_dependencies
tools.description: Return every asset (package path) that this asset DEPENDS on.

tools.name: get_project_metadata
tools.description: Read the project's `.uproject` file and return parsed metadata (project name, EngineAssociation, category, description, plus the raw JSON for anything else).

tools.name: get_referencers
tools.description: Return every asset (package path) that REFERENCES this asset.

tools.name: read_config_value
tools.description: Read a UE config (.ini) value.

tools.name: find_asset
tools.description: Find assets whose name or package path contains `query` (case-insensitive).

tools.name: list_assets
tools.description: List every asset (any UClass) under `path`.

tools.name: read_actor_instance
tools.description: Read ANY object instance by package path, including a level-placed actor stored in its own external package under `/<Mount>/__ExternalActors__/...` (World Partition / One-File-Per-Actor), which `read_blueprint` can't open.

tools.name: find_class
tools.description: Search the UClass registry by substring.

tools.name: get_class_info
tools.description: Inspect a UClass: parent + ancestor chain + every UPROPERTY + UFUNCTION.

tools.name: list_functions
tools.description: List every UFUNCTION on a class with its flags (BlueprintCallable, BlueprintPure, etc.).

tools.name: list_niagara_systems
tools.description: List UNiagaraSystem assets under a content path (default `/Game`).

tools.name: read_niagara_system
tools.description: Read a UNiagaraSystem's emitter handles (each names an underlying UNiagaraEmitter) and its exposed user parameter names.

tools.name: list_materials
tools.description: List all UMaterial / UMaterialInstance assets under a content path.

tools.name: read_material
tools.description: Read a material's expression graph: every UMaterialExpression node (id, class, parameter name, x/y), every connection (from expression output → expression input or master-material slot like BaseColor / Roughness), and the names of all exposed scalar/vector parameters.

tools.name: list_level_sequences
tools.description: List ULevelSequence assets under a content path.

tools.name: read_level_sequence
tools.description: Read a sequence's playback range (start/end seconds) and its top-level tracks.

tools.name: list_gameplay_tags
tools.description: Query the project's GameplayTagsManager.

tools.name: read_ability_set
tools.description: Read a GAS ability-set DataAsset: every granted ability class + its level.

tools.name: diff_asset
tools.description: Structural diff between two Blueprint assets.

tools.name: prepare_merge
tools.description: AI-assisted merge context.

tools.name: list_state_trees
tools.description: List UStateTree assets under a content path (default `/Game`).

tools.name: read_state_tree
tools.description: Read a UStateTree's hierarchy + transitions: every state (id, name, parent) and every transition (from, to, trigger).

tools.name: list_data_tables
tools.description: List all UDataTable assets under a content path.

tools.name: read_data_table
tools.description: Load a DataTable and return its row-struct type, column names, and every row's field values.

tools.name: list_data_assets
tools.description: List all UDataAsset subclass instances under a content path.

tools.name: read_data_asset
tools.description: Read every UPROPERTY on a UDataAsset.

tools.name: list_behavior_trees
tools.description: List UBehaviorTree assets under a content path (default `/Game`).

tools.name: read_behavior_tree
tools.description: Walk a UBehaviorTree's node graph.

tools.name: list_node_kinds
tools.description: List the `kind` values that `add_node` accepts, with required extras for each.

tools.name: list_pin_categories
tools.description: List the canonical BPPinType.category values + container modifiers.

tools.name: compile_function
tools.description: Compile a tiny pseudocode DSL into a fully-wired Blueprint function.

tools.name: preview_ops
tools.description: Validate an apply_ops batch without mutating anything.

tools.name: describe_k2node
tools.description: Introspect a K2 node class (custom or engine): given a class path like `/Script/BlueprintGraph.K2Node_FormatText` (or a short name like `K2Node_FormatText`), spawns a transient instance, calls AllocateDefaultPins, and reports its pins (name/direction/type/defaults), purity, title, tooltip, menu category, parent class, and owning module.

tools.name: read_widget_blueprint
tools.description: Read a UWidgetBlueprint's widget tree: every UWidget node (name, class, parent name) and the root widget's name.

sections.heading: Skills & the audit agent
sections.html: Ship with the plugin under Claude/; install with Install-ClaudeAssets.ps1 or point your client's skills folder at it.

skills.name: aethyr
skills.description: Core skill: inspect, edit, and operate on Blueprints: the wire format, package paths, per-tool guidance.

skills.name: bp-batches
skills.description: Multi-step edits as one transaction: apply_ops / preview_ops / compile_function, with rollback-on-failure.

skills.name: bp-debug
skills.description: Failure triage: error codes, package-vs-object paths, did-you-mean, partial-write recovery.

skills.name: bp-audit
skills.description: Read-only structural auditor: "audit /Game/AI" fans out reads and returns a tight report; mutates nothing.

sections.heading: Configuration
sections.html: Set these in your MCP client's env block. The defaults are safe.

flags.name: AETHYR_PROJECT
flags.description: Path to the `.uproject` to drive. Auto-discovered above the server if unset.

flags.name: AETHYR_ALLOW_WRITE
flags.description: Set `1` to enable write tools. **Off by default**: read-only until you opt in.

flags.name: AETHYR_BACKUP
flags.description: `1` by default: copies an asset to a backup ring before its first save each session.

flags.name: AETHYR_AUTO_CHECKOUT
flags.description: `1` by default: auto-checks-out an asset from source control before a write.

backends.name: auto
backends.description: The default. Probes each call and routes to live if an editor is open, else commandlet.

backends.name: live
backends.description: Talks to a running editor over a local TCP socket (fast; great while you're working in-editor).

backends.name: commandlet
backends.description: Spawns a headless editor to serve calls when none is open.

backends.name: mock
backends.description: Fixtures only, no engine; for trying the wire format without a project. Writes are blocked.
